items.name: nango:test:create:scope
items.description: Test scope created by Nango dryrun

items.name: nango:test:read
items.description: Custom scope seeded for Nango registry testing

items.name: openid
items.description: Signals that a request is an OpenID request.

items.name: profile
items.description: The exact data varies based on what profile information you have provided, such as: name, time zone, picture, or birthday.

items.name: email
items.description: This allows the app to view your email address.

items.name: address
items.description: This allows the app to view your address, such as: street address, city, state, and zip code.

items.name: phone
items.description: This allows the app to view your phone number.

items.name: offline_access
items.description: This keeps you signed in to the app, even when you are not using it.
items.displayName: Keep you signed in to the app.

items.name: device_sso
items.description: This allows you to single sign on between native client applications on your device.
